calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Default Prove-Up Hearing for Possession Only as to defendant Josias Lopez-Castanon.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Howard Olsen, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Charles Young, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Josias Lopez-Castanon.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on December 26, 2018.
Defendant's answer was filed on January 14, 2019.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on January 22, 2019, setting the Trial Date for February 4, 2019.
Defendant Josias Lopez-Castanon failed to appear for Trial Call on February 4, 2019, and the Court entered a default at that time as to defendant Josias Lopez-Castanon.
A Settlement Protective Date was set for today, February 19, 2019, as to defendants Nelson Lopez-Castanon and Yeistry Lopez-Castanon.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, February 19, 2019.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendants Nelson Lopez-Castanon and Yeistry Lopez-Castanon was filed with the Clerk's Office today, February 19, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Charles Young, and against the defaulted defendant Josias Lopez-Castanon, as follows:

Judgment is for Possession only. Plaintiff Charles Young is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 766 Thornton Avenue - Lower Unit, San Francisco, CA 94124, as to defendant Josias Lopez-Castanon.

The rental agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Off Calendar

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: J. Timothy Norvell; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Charles Young is present.
Attorney Howard Olsen for the plaintiff.
Defendants Nelson Lopez-Castanon and are Yeistry Lopez-Castanon are present.
Defendant Josias Lopez-Castanon is NOT present.
Attorney Judondi Bolden appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Feb-04-2019 remains on calendar. (501)
